summary: Iteration 5 P1 sprint testing complete. Backend pytest 11/11 PASSED in test_iter5_p1.py: manager my-timeseries (30d=30 entries with date/orders/revenue_cents/fulfilled, 7d=7 entries, unauth=403), manager network-ranking (sorted desc by revenue_cents, ranks 1..N, my_rank.point_id=lp-2 for gerant, total_points=10), Emergent OAuth scaffolding (POST /session INVALID -> 401 detail='Session Emergent invalide', GET /me sans cookie -> 401), catalog territory filter (GP & MQ both return >=1 product since seeded products have territories=[] = all), POS orders territory filter (GP returns 3 orders all in GP lolo_point set, MQ returns 0). Frontend: /connexion google-login-btn present text 'Continuer avec Google', /auth/callback (no hash) renders auth-callback-page with 'Aucun identifiant de session reçu d'Emergent.' message + 'Retour à la connexion' CTA. Manager dashboard /lolo-point/dashboard: manager-performance-section + manager-ranking-section present, days-7/30/90-btn all rendered, 2 Recharts SVGs (AreaChart CA + BarChart commandes/jour), rank-row-LP-CAP highlighted via bg-[#D9B35A]/10 class, days-7-btn click triggers reload of my-timeseries?days=7 + network-ranking?days=7. Catalog /catalogue-lolodrive: catalog-territory-selector + 4 pills (GP/MQ/GF/RE) present, click on -MQ pill triggers /catalog/products?territory=MQ. Admin /admin/lolo-points (regression): Mapbox canvas renders + KPIs + territory pills (Tous/Guadeloupe/Martinique/Guyane/La Réunion) all visible. Scheduler started log 'Scheduler started (PASS J-3 every 6.0h)' confirmed in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log line 1092. Fixed Badge component in LolodriveLayout.jsx to forward extra props (data-testid='my-rank-badge' now reaches DOM).

issues: The 'Tous' pill (catalog-territory-selector-ALL) does not have a unique data-testid; the 4 territory codes (GP/MQ/GF/RE) do. Minor — does not block testing.

critical_code_review_comments: scheduler.py: clean asyncio loop with 60s startup delay + crash protection via try/except around _send_pass_j3_batch; idempotent via j3_notified_at flag — good. Brevo gating via is_brevo_configured() prevents repeated failures.

routes_emergent_auth.py: proper handling — returns 401 'Session Emergent invalide' on bad session_id, 502 on network error, secure+samesite=none cookie, expiry check on /me with cleanup of expired sessions. Also issues a JWT for app compatibility — clean dual-auth bridge.

routes_lolodrive_oscoop.py manager_my_timeseries: clamps days to [7,90] which means the spec-default of 30d works correctly; series builds N entries via cursor loop ensuring no missing days. Aggregation excludes CANCELLED/PENDING orders correctly.
manager_network_ranking: sorts by (revenue_cents, orders) desc — good tiebreaker. my_rank lookup is O(N) but fine for ~10-50 points. ACTIVE filter only (correct).

Catalog territory filter logic (line 315-321): products with empty/missing territories array AVAILABLE EVERYWHERE — implemented via $or with $exists/$size/$in — good multi-territory model; spec confirmed and tested.
POS orders territory filter (line 559): two-step lookup (lolodrive_points -> ids, then orders $in) — correct. Could be a single $lookup but volume is fine.
Badge component in LolodriveLayout.jsx now forwards rest props (fixed during this iter) — same pattern as SectionCard fix in iter4, ensures data-testid attributes from caller reach the DOM.
test_credentials: admin@kdmarche-oscop.fr / AdminKDM2025! ; marie@example.com / Demo2026! ; gerant@lolopoint.fr / Demo2026! - login submit button label is 'Se connecter'.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created — used existing seeded data (lp-2 LP-CAP for gerant, marie's PASS, admin POS access).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduler runs in background, logs 'Scheduler started (PASS J-3 every 6.0h)' once at startup, sleeps 60s then runs every 6h — do NOT expect immediate batch output. Emergent OAuth: only 401 paths can be tested without a real Google session; do not attempt to mock /session-data — test_session_invalid covers the negative path. Catalog product list returns dict {pass_active, products:[...]} (NOT a bare list). POS orders endpoint returns dict {orders:[...]}. lolo-points endpoint returns either bare list or {points:[...]} — handle both. Unauthenticated GETs return 403 (FastAPI HTTPBearer default) not 401 — accept (401, 403). Badge component (LolodriveLayout.jsx) and SectionCard now both forward extra props.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. One small improvement was made: Badge component was not forwarding data-testid (introduced for LoloPointManagerPage's MON RANG badge). Fixed by spreading ...rest props. After fix, my-rank-badge testid resolves correctly with text 'Mon rang : #2/10'.
